history.content:
<thought>
I can see the goal (G) in the upper-right area, but the cell directly in front of me (above ^) is lava (L), so I should not move forward. I’ll turn right to try to approach the goal via a safer path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is to my left. The cell directly in front of me is lava (L), so I must not move forward. I will turn left to face the goal direction.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The map shows the goal G two rows above me in the right corridor area. The cell directly in front of me is a floor (.), while lava cells are to the left in the lower row. To move toward the goal, I should go forward first.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
